Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Pure Storm Baptism]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Wintersteel ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 15''' — The Pure Storm Baptism is a spiritual restoration process created by Tiberian Arelius to undo long-term soul damage.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 15''' — The Pure Storm Baptism is a procedure that can turn someone into an extraordinary Underlord.}}

== Bloodline ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 10''' — Eithan completed the Pure Storm Baptism before leaving.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 21''' — Pure Storm Baptism is a restorative technique used by Ziel.}}

== Reaper ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 4''' — Ziel has reached a new stage of the Pure Storm Baptism.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 7''' — Ziel made an oath to Eithan in return for the Pure Storm Baptism.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 13''' — Eithan has been using the Soulforge to prepare materials for the Pure Storm Baptism that Ziel enjoyed.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 18''' — Pure Storm Baptism is a resource/technique Eithan has access to.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 18''' — Ziel's soul was stable enough after the Pure Storm Baptism to advance its level of existence.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
